description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
On June 17, 2025 at 11:11 PM PT a Waymo Autonomous Vehicle (“Waymo AV”) operating in Los Angeles, California was in a collision 
involving a horizontal support beam attached to the ceiling in a parking structure at 170 N. Church Lane.  
 
The Waymo AV was traveling southbound in a parking structure at 170 N. Church Lane at a low rate of speed when the sensor mounted on 
the roof of the Waymo AV made contact with a horizontal support beam attached to the ceiling of the parking structure. At the time of the 
impact, the Waymo AV’s Level 4 ADS was not engaged and a test driver was operating the Waymo AV in manual mode. The Waymo AV 
sustained damage. 
 
Waymo may supplement or correct its reporting with additional information as it may become available 
Print
Clear Form
